issues.description: Text states '[Your Turn]' which indicates the effect lasts during your turn only. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Per duration rules, '[Your Turn]' in text → duration:'DuringYourTurn' (not EndOfTurn/Permanent).
Target should specify the card type [Trafalgar Law] in the selection criteria, not just any own character. Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' is too broad.
